display_text: Morphling Aghanim's Scepter: Morph creates a strong illusion of the target hero that can cast basic abilities. This upgrade transforms Morphling into a hybrid illusion-based hero, enabling him to apply pressure from multiple fronts while being unpredictable, countering single-target focus strategies.
search_text: Morphling Aghanim Scepter illusion hybrid counter-single-target pressure unpredictable role change

display_text: Morphling Aghanim's Shard: Attribute Shift can be used while stunned, providing a powerful anti-disable mechanic. This upgrade ensures Morphling maintains survivability and adaptability even under heavy control effects, countering lockdown-heavy lineups.
search_text: Morphling Aghanim Shard Attribute Shift anti-disable counter-lockdown survivability
